_doc: Allowlist for scripts/lint-citations.mjs. Add numbers/patterns that are deliberate editorial citations not present in Supabase migrations. The lint script greps the actual migration corpus for substring matches first; only add here if the value is editorial methodology, a UI default, or a documented forward-extrapolation anchor.
_format: numbers: array of substrings to match against citation numerals. patterns: array of substrings to match against citation text.
